log.content: Stores key-value pairs using hash function. O(1) average-case operations. Handles collisions with chaining or open addressing. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Data Structures **🔗 Related Concepts:** - array - linked list - singly linked list

Learns word embeddings from large corpus. Two architectures: CBOW (predict word from context), Skip-gram (predict context from word). Captures semantic relationships. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Machine Learning **🔗 Related Concepts:** - machine learning - supervised learning - unsupervised learning

Examining code for bugs, style, and best practices. Improves code quality, knowledge sharing. Can be pair programming or pull request reviews. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Software Engineering **🔗 Related Concepts:** - SDLC - Agile - Scrum

Breadth-First Search explores graph level by level using queue. Finds shortest path in unweighted graphs. O(V+E) time. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Algorithms **🔗 Related Concepts:** - binary search - linear search - bubble sort

Depth-First Search explores graph by going as deep as possible using stack/recursion. Used for cycle detection, topological sort. O(V+E) time. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Algorithms **🔗 Related Concepts:** - binary search - linear search - bubble sort

Simple sorting that repeatedly swaps adjacent elements if out of order. O(n²) time. Rarely used in practice. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Algorithms **🔗 Related Concepts:** - binary search - linear search - bubble sort
